title: Koopman Square Cubed Plant Pot Light Grey Planter Double Walled Ribbed Flower Pot
features: Stylish and modern flower pot, with a unique ribbed design, suitable for indoor or outdoor use.
This plant pot has a chic design, and will bring a sophisticated and elegant touch to your home.
Made from plastic this planter is UV resistant to protect against colour fade.
It will look fabulous with some greenery or flowers, placed on your patio, deck or balcony.
Dimensions approx: Width 29cm Height 26cm . Internal Dimensions: Width 22cm Height 21cm.
